subcodes.first_line: Dear and cherished friend, your calling card, conveyed through one of the beloved of God, hath been received and served to bring you to remembrance, though indeed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست عزیز مهربان کارت ویزیت شما بواسطه یکی از احباء الله واصل سبب ذکر و یاد شما شد اگرچه همیشه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @predictions and prophecies
